blurb: Ultra Wideband radio on Apple devices enables centimeter-precise spatial ranging for passive car key entry, Find My precision finding, and directional AirDrop. UWB ranging sessions are protected by session keys derived from a prior Bluetooth pairing exchange, ensuring only previously authenticated devices can establish ranging sessions. The short range of UWB combined with physical-layer time-of-flight measurement makes relay attacks significantly harder than with Bluetooth or NFC. Car key UWB ranging uses enhanced ranging calibration data and cryptographic binding of measurements to prevent spoofing of distance values by a relay adversary.
